name: reload-claude-md
description: Re-read the CLAUDE.md memory files in effect and re-anchor the running session to their current on-disk content, so edits made mid-session take effect without a restart. Claude Code loads CLAUDE.md only at session start and has no native reload (only /compact re-injects the project-root file, with side effects); this fills that gap. Reads the user, project-root, nested, and local CLAUDE.md files plus their @imports, reports what changed since the session began, and adopts the new version. Read-only; user-invoked as /reload-claude-md [path].
